text.title: RAG Canary Rollout Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to execute a RAG canary rollout per the fixed curve.

step.name: draft-plan
step.input: baseline_version + target_version + golden_eval_id + rubric_id + cost budget
step.action: Author rollout-plan.json with the fixed 4-step curve, golden_eval thresholds, online_quality.sample_rate≥0.05, kill_switch ≥4 criteria.
step.decision-gate: validate-rag-canary-rollout-plan.py returns OK; else fix and re-author.

step.name: rehearse-kill-switch
step.action: Trigger a synthetic kill-switch flip; measure completion time end-to-end. Must complete in ≤60s without a deploy.
step.decision-gate: If >60s → block rollout; redesign gateway for atomic flips.

step.name: step-1pct
step.action: Enable 1% for 24h. Run golden eval at start; sample online quality at ≥5% of canary traffic (≥200/hr). Watch latency p95 delta.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails or composite_score < floor → kill switch + rollback receipt.

step.name: step-5pct
step.action: Promote to 5% for 24h. Re-run golden eval; raise online sample_rate as load allows.
step.decision-gate: Same as step 3; if fail → rollback.

step.name: step-25pct
step.action: Promote to 25% for 48h. Watch for distribution shifts that only appear at scale.
step.decision-gate: Same as step 3; if fail → rollback.

step.name: step-100pct-and-soak
step.action: Promote to 100%. Soak 168h with online quality scoring on continuously.
step.decision-gate: If soak detects drift → kill switch + rollback.
